name: neuro-commerce-os
description: Complete Business Operating System — Diagnostic → Brand → Content → Ads → Growth. Executes the full NextLuma 5-phase framework with 13 skills and 5 specialized agents (The Architect, Brand Architect, Content Engineer, Ads Engineer, Growth Orchestrator). Includes video/social diagnostics that drive installed video-analysis MCP tools to teardown reels (hook, retention, pacing, virality). Ships its own MCP server (19 tools) and free-tool fallbacks.
